actions.label: Match Components...
actions.tooltip:
Opens a UI for viewing and editing the current match components.

Match components should not be manually edited once game settings have been confirmed.

Some match components are tied to a particular game mode and cannot be changed through this menu.

actions.label: Run Update Function
actions.tooltip: Reloads the data pack and runs the latest version update function (if it wasn't already ran from the reload). Used to resync world changes during development.
